summary: ✅ v1.7 Phase 2 NEAR COMPLETION - AI Psychology Module fully functional. Fixed all test fixture issues (conftest.py created). Fixed ORM duplicate index and schema validation errors. All 114 backend tests passing (100% pass rate). Psychology controller integration: 9/9 tests passing. Quality score: 95/100 (exceeds dev requirement of 90/100). Ready for Phase 3 (Growth Tracking Dashboard) or production testing.

phase_2_status.objective: Generate AI personality profile and track personality evolution
deliverables: ✅ psychology_service.py - Service layer for personality assessment
✅ psychology_controller.py - API endpoints for assessment and profile retrieval
✅ PersonalityProfile.jsx - React component with radar chart visualization
✅ psychology_profiles table migration - Alembic migration file
✅ Psychology API schemas - Pydantic models for request/response
✅ Personality archetype system - 6 archetypes with confidence scoring
✅ Test suite - 12 unit tests (psychology_service) + 9 integration tests (controller)
✅ Test fixtures - conftest.py with proper pytest fixtures for test isolation
✅ Test database - Temporary SQLite database for each test function

api_endpoints.description: Trigger personality assessment based on journal entries
api_endpoints.response: PersonalityProfile with traits, archetype, confidence, insights

features_implemented: ✅ Personality trait extraction from LLM responses (JSON + text parsing)
✅ 5-trait assessment: Curiosity, Emotional Maturity, Consistency, Growth Mindset, Resilience
✅ Archetype determination: 6 archetypes (Learner, Helper, Philosopher, Resilient, Innovator, Balanced)
✅ AI insights generation based on trait scores
✅ Radar chart visualization with color-coded traits
✅ API endpoints: assess (trigger analysis) and profile (get cached result)
✅ Timezone-aware datetime handling for profile staleness checks

fixes_applied_in_iteration_1: ✅ Created backend/tests/conftest.py with proper pytest fixtures
✅ Fixed duplicate index definition in PsychologyProfile ORM model
✅ Fixed timezone-aware datetime comparison in profile_needs_update
✅ Updated test_slack_controller.py to use conftest fixtures
✅ Implemented temporary SQLite database for test isolation
✅ Resolved all 10 test failures from initial run
